summary: Implementation review accepts the read capability asset lifecycle batch as bounded Stage 5 Lode package/catalog truth.
reviewed_validation_summary: python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json; jq registry query/candidate checks; git diff --check; loom suite validate/evidence/carrier; loom fact-chain; loom verify passed locally before PR. Loom verify reports Codex plugin runtime cache stale while CLI/source payload is 0.28.0; treated as host runtime cache surface, not repo code.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change exposes versioned read capability candidates, schemas, resource requirements, fixtures, post-check refs, Core admission fields, and local registry query facts without claiming runtime execution or downstream truth ownership.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Validator coverage now checks package path lock resolution, registry query fixture shape, forbidden key material, and Core admission fields for all local registry entries.
